abstract.text: This struct defines a keyboard-specific theme, which can
be used to define a bunch of styles at once.

inlineContent.text: A theme can be copied, tweaked, styled, etc. This struct
it share copy logic with its style variations.
KeyboardKit Pro has many pre-defined themes & styles, as
well as a theme-based style service.
can be used to apply a theme, which will apply all style

abstract.text: KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
